title: Laboratory Emergency Response
description: Emergency ContactNYU Shanghai EHS team provides emergency response, emphasizing the protection of community members' health and safety as well as vital infrastructure and physical assets.Relying on Campus Safety's resources, EHS has established an emergency response team that is available 24/7. Call
text:
Laboratory Emergency Response
Emergency Contact
NYU Shanghai EHS team provides emergency response, emphasizing the protection of community members' health and safety as well as vital infrastructure and physical assets.
Relying on Campus Safety's resources, EHS has established an emergency response team that is available 24/7. Call Campus Safety at 2059 5500 for any emergencies or incidents.
To help expedite emergency handling, each laboratory space should have the hazardous information and the contact information of the person in charge posted on the door, ensuring that the emergency response team can promptly reach them in case of an emergency.
Emergency Response Plan
Every community member who works or studies in the laboratories of NYU Shanghai should read through the relevant Emergency Response Plan (ERP) and keep the brochure handy for further reference in the lab spaces. Don’t wait until there is an emergency!
Chemical Spill Response Drill
Please watch the video of the Drill of Chemical Spill Response
Emergency Preparedness
Prevention is the key to avoiding accidents and the essence of safety training. The idea of Emergency Preparedness is to help everyone to prepare for such situations to minimize personal injury and property damage.
Be Prepared for Fire
Be Prepared for Injury
Be Prepared for Laboratory Emergency
Emergency Response Procedure
Familiarise yourself with the following procedures shown in ERP.
Reporting Procedure
Procedure for Injury and Illness
Procedure for Spill
Procedure for Fire
Material Safety Data Sheets
Copies of Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) should be located in laboratories and the storage room. Campus Safety and EHS team has access to these documents in the event of an emergency.
Campus Safety
Campus Safety Services
Overview of Campus Safety Services and Functions
Campus Safety Emergencies
Campus Safety team is here to provide 24/7 emergency support
